this is a one star review cuz i can't even play 
.

reviews.review_title: Great game with alot of Potential
reviews.review_description: The game is really well made, it has many game modes to play, you can also play these modes with friends across 5 different enviroment/maps which is amazing! There is avatar customization so you can change up your jersey or colors! The only thing they really need to fix in this game is the multiplayer lag and it would almost perfect! I highly recommend showing your support and Buy this game! Its alot of fun I promise!

reviews.review_title: Very very very cool. Praise Jesus !
reviews.review_description: I’ve looked forward to a vr basketball game that has ai. They basically have no basketball with ai computer opponents. This is the only one out there. I bought it expecting only ai for horse, but it works for full 1vs1 games. Really like blocking or stuffing and packing the opponent. Dunking over them too. It’s much better than I had expected. Loaded with multiple courts and player options. Multiplayer too. Jesus loves you !
one thing for the game add some more maps and when we go to peoples private server its very buggy to shoot in the game and fix the ai to anyways thats all i got peace.
If your game won’t load. Make sure you have an updated headset. Uninstall and then reinstall. Make sure you allow permissions. Should work then.
I like the concept that you get to customize it kinda makes you like click to its just a fun game make sure to get this game its worth it
Very good recommend very much good good good it’s so good with the best VR basketballs I’ve ever played in my whole life it’s like it cost $100
The one down side is the game is sadly kinda dead

I would love too see a proper basketball game mode full court! 
You play a 5v5 full court! In the future!

And add bots too a 2v2 so you can play with your one other friend if you dont have 4!

This game is very i fun I really recommend it… but only if you have friends to play it with cause… I never find people on multiplayer on this game… but if you have a lot of friends that has the same game then I would get it
The only problem I have with this game is that theres never anyone that plays online maybe everything else is great.

It is fun but it actually very buggy, when playing a one on one and you rebound and dribble they call a thing on you, and you actually don’t shoot realistically, you just push your hand out and it goes flying across the court, or when you block someone it just flys into the wall. I’ve also had cases of falling out of the map and having to relaunch the game to fix it. If they fix the bugs and spice up the game it would be good..

Pickup Basketball VR is a great game, it’s h the only basketball game on vr that lets you play with bots for 3pt contest, Horse, and 1v1. The shooting is really good and it’s fun to mess around with the shoot assist, I also like the dribble assist. It’s worth the price. Highly recommend.
